ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., AUD/USD) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., currency pair, commodity, index) */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the financial instrument (e.g., AUD for AUD/USD) */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the financial instrument (e.g., USD for AUD/USD) */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the financial instrument (e.g., FX, Commodity, Index) */,
  "contract_size" REAL /* Contract size for the financial instrument */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Minimum price movement for the financial instrument */,
  "liquidity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the liquidity of the instrument (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "reporting_quarter" TEXT /* Reporting quarter for the market data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "simple_average_price" REAL /* Simple average price of the financial instrument */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the financial instrument */,
  "highest_executed_price" REAL /* Highest executed price of the financial instrument */,
  "lowest_executed_price" REAL /* Lowest executed price of the financial instrument */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the financial instrument */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data source */,
  "data_feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_reporting_quarter FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_quarter") REFERENCES reporting_quarters ("quarter_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting quarter (e.g., 2019 Q3) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting quarter */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reporting quarter */,
  "quarter_number" INTEGER /* Quarter number (1-4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the company (e.g., Senior Trader, Lead Analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Trading, Research) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., trend, pattern, recommendation) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data source used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result (0-1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, trend change) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "trigger_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert was triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data source */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful data sync */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data sync (e.g., 10 minutes, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_data_feed" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_name")
)
